status.finding: The designated La Jolla Covering Repository page still reports the one-bit gap and prints a 41-block witness.
status.scope_warning: The search found no newer exact-value publication, but absence from a bounded web search is not proof of novelty or nonpublication. The successor repository entry for these exact parameters was not independently extracted from its dynamic interface.

authoritative_sources.observed: 40 <= C(12,6,4) <= 41; construction credited to Nurmela and Ostergard simulated annealing; lower bound credited to Schonheim
Published 2026-04-24; contains best-known coverings and improvement history through the frozen database
Imports historical (v,k,t) data through March 2026 and tracks later improvements

historical_method_map.relevance: Schon's/Schoenheim's covering recurrence underlies the maintained lower-bound chain
The maintained page attributes the 41-block construction to Nurmela and Ostergard's simulated-annealing work
Historical construction framework and small-parameter upper-bound tables; not an exact exclusion method for this case
Defines the covering number, states the Schoenheim recurrence, and notes that individual exact lower bounds often require case analysis or computation
General canonical augmentation and classification methodology applicable to a negative certificate

verification_tooling.workspace_observation: The replay wrapper exists, but no project-scoped or system drat-trim binary/source is present in this checkout; proof replay cannot currently be reproduced here
Pinned python-sat 1.9.dev7 is installed; official API documents seqcounter, totalizer, mtotalizer, and kmtotalizer
Candidate canonical-labeling tool; not installed or used in the baseline audit

local_prior_art_register.note: The supplied compact registry and filesystem contain no C(12,6,4) prior-art registry entry. This is a registry gap, not a novelty finding.

bounded_searches.finding: Recovered the maintained repository, historical construction material, and unrelated balanced 3-(12,6,4)/4-(12,6,4) design literature; no exact-value settlement located

bounded_searches.query: Nurmela Ostergard Upper bounds for covering designs by simulated annealing C(12,6,4)
bounded_searches.finding: Recovered the institutional technical-report record and journal metadata for the construction method

bounded_searches.query: covering designs SAT exact covering number computational proof
bounded_searches.finding: Found modern SAT-based work on other covering problems but no primary source applying a certified exhaustive SAT proof to C(12,6,4)

bounded_searches.query: C(12,6,4) prior-art registry and strategy entries
bounded_searches.finding: No problem-specific stable prior-art ID exists; only the campaign's internal pilot artifacts were present

preexisting_internal_artifacts.classification: unpublished internal controls and scoped pilot evidence
preexisting_internal_artifacts.summary: The existing campaign summary records four link orbits excluded by residual checks, 189 replay receipts, and 47 open frontier nodes; direct depth-7 sampling provisionally closed 10/128 cubes. These do not establish an exact value.
preexisting_internal_artifacts.reproducibility_gap: Pilot receipts refer to a Mac project-scoped CaDiCaL/DRAT-trim toolchain not present in this checkout. Hashes remain recorded, but fresh replay on this host is blocked until a pinned checker is restored.

external_acceptance_path.positive_result: Submit the 40-block list plus direct all-495-subset checker receipt for repository verification.
external_acceptance_path.negative_result: First obtain independent proof-log/cube-cover validation and specialist review; then report the exact-value result and public certificate archive to the maintainers.
